message:
fix(wizard): simplify create-vps form to fix tanstack/react-form types

The @tanstack/react-form v1 has strict generic requirements. Simplified
the form by moving checklist state to local useState and removing
the complex FormValues type parameter that was causing build failures.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
